narrative:
Fairlawn 5-A (precinct in Summit County) has 887 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.4 percentage points.
